name: Partoo
description:
Partoo’s goal is to help businesses gain more online visibility and customers. It provides an all-in-one solution that enables businesses to measure their ROI and gain more customers. 

Source: Partoo

➡️ Centralizes the management of business information across various platforms.

➡️ Monitors and responds to customer reviews from multiple review sites.

➡️ Synchronizes business listings across directories and social networks.

➡️ Optimizes local search visibility for businesses.

➡️ Enables direct messaging with customers from a single platform.

➡️ Provides detailed insights and analytics on online performance.

➡️ Offers insights into competitor performance and strategies.

➡️ Manages information for businesses with multiple locations.

➡️ Integrates online booking systems for customer appointments.

➡️ Offers a mobile app for on-the-go management and monitoring.

Benefits

⭐️ Improves local search rankings and online presence.

⭐️ Facilitates better customer interaction through review responses and messaging.

⭐️ Ensures consistent business information across all online platforms.

⭐️ Saves time by centralizing and automating listing updates and review management.

⭐️ Helps manage and enhance online reputation through proactive review management.

⭐️ Empowers businesses with actionable insights from analytics and reporting.

⭐️ Provides a competitive advantage with insights into competitor strategies.

⭐️ Efficiently handles the needs of multi-location businesses.

⭐️ Enhances customer experience with easy online appointment booking.

⭐️ Offers convenience and flexibility with a mobile app for managing tasks on the go.

Pros:

✅ Easy to use 

✅ Comprehensive insights and analytics

Cons:

❌ Customer Support is not that great 

❌ Does not offer a citation builder, listings management, local rank tracker for Local SEO optimization

‍

Pricing is not transparent
what_people_say:
Likes: 

‍

Partoo is very easy to implement into our processes and very easy to use. We were given some easy instructions, on how to improve our e reputation. Especially our store staff, who have been managing several accounts on Google My Business, Apple Maps, Bing, etc. save a lot of time and are very happy to use this time on customers walking into the stores. In addition, we finally have a good way to analyze and improve KPIs like average ratings, answer rate of reviews, and so on. Regularly. 

‍

Dislikes: 

‍

There is not much to dislike about Partoo. The only thing would be that we could sometimes use German-speaking support for our German-speaking stores. But since they do offer customer support in English and French, we still get all our issues solved quickly. 

‍

*Review sourced and cited through G2*
